pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 7 and export_result.sh line 6 both explicitly use this path for the accommodation plan report
task.json description explicitly states 'You are a special education teacher at Sunrise Academy'
GCompris-qt config directory confirmed in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh; standard location for GCompris-qt configuration on Linux
setup_task.sh sets filterLevelMax=6 as default; GCompris documentation confirms difficulty range is 1-6 with max being 6
task.json description states 'maximum difficulty level 3'; verifier.py line 84 defines config_max_at_target as config_filter_max <= 3; GCompris supports difficulty levels 1-6
verifier.py line 76 checks 'if size >= 350'; README.md line 25 specifies 'Be at least 350 bytes'; consistent across all task documentation

privileged_info_summary: The task uses GCompris, a real open-source educational software suite for children ages 2-10 with 190+ activities. GCompris has a real difficulty filtering system supporting levels 1-6, controlled via the filterLevelMax configuration parameter stored in /home/ga/.config/gcompris-qt/gcompris-qt.conf. The default filter is set to 6 (show all difficulty levels), and the task requires reducing it to 3 (show only levels 1-3, the most accessible activities). The accommodation plan report is saved to /home/ga/Desktop/accommodation_plan.txt and must be at least 350 bytes. The task assigns the role of Special Education Teacher configuring GCompris for a student with cognitive learning challenges.
